title: pelargonium × megalanthum
intro: Pelargonium × megalanthum, also known as the Cape Geranium or White Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Pelargonium × megalanthum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce the severity of colds and flu. Pelargonium × megalanthum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
